---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aespdom
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/aespdom
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:aloespdom@gmail.com

---

My name is Alonso Espinosa Domínguez. I am a mathematician-in-training based in
Texas, and soon in Mexico City. I completed an undergraduate degree in mathematics
at MIT in 2020, spent several years away from the subject, and am now making my
way back.

My mathematical interests center on analysis, topology, geometry, and mathematical logic and foundations. I am also interested in the history and
philosophy of mathematics — particularly in taking seriously the idea that
mathematical practice is a human and social activity, shaped by the same forces
that shape everything else.

The longer version of all of this is in the [Welcome post](/posts/en/Welcome-to-Math-Adventures/index.html)
